entry.name: showOnlyCurrentScreen
entry.label: Whether to show only window tasks that are on the same screen as the widget.

entry.name: showOnlyCurrentDesktop
entry.label: Whether to only show tasks that are on the current virtual desktop.

entry.name: showOnlyCurrentActivity
entry.label: Whether to show only tasks that are on the current activity.

entry.name: showOnlyMinimized
entry.label: Whether to show only window tasks that are minmized.

entry.name: unhideOnAttention
entry.label: Whether to unhide if a window wants attention.

entry.name: groupingStrategy
entry.label: How tasks are grouped: 0 = Do Not Group (each window = own icon), 1 = By Program Name.

entry.name: groupedTaskVisualization
entry.label: What happens when clicking on a grouped task: 0 = cycle through grouped tasks, 1 = try to show tooltips, 2 = try to show present Windows effect, 3 = show textual list (AKA group dialog)

entry.name: groupPopups
entry.label: Whether groups are to be reduced to a single task button and expand into a popup or task buttons are grouped on the widget itself.

entry.name: onlyGroupWhenFull
entry.label: Whether to group always or only when the widget runs out of space to show additional task buttons comfortably.

entry.name: groupingAppIdBlacklist
entry.label: The id's (usually .desktop file names) of applications that should not have their tasks grouped.

entry.name: groupingLauncherUrlBlacklist
entry.label: The launcher URLs (usually .desktop file or executable URLs) of applications that should not have their tasks grouped.

entry.name: sortingStrategy
entry.label: How to sort tasks: 0 = Do Not Sort, 1 = Manually, 2 = Alphabetically, 3 = By Desktop, 4 = By Activity

entry.name: separateLaunchers
entry.label: Whether launcher tasks are sorted separately at the left side of the widget or can be mixed with other tasks.

entry.name: maxStripes
entry.label: The maximum number of rows (in a horizontal-orientation containment, i.e. panel) or columns (in a vertical-orientation containment) to layout task buttons in.

entry.name: forceStripes
entry.label: Whether to try and always layout task buttons in as many rows/columns as set via maxStripes.

entry.name: showToolTips
entry.label: Whether to show tooltips when hovering task buttons.

entry.name: wheelEnabled
entry.label: Whether using the mouse wheel with the mouse pointer above the widget should switch between tasks.

entry.name: wheelSkipMinimized
entry.label: Whether to skip minimized tasks when switching between them using the mouse wheel.

entry.name: highlightWindows
entry.label: Whether to request the window manager highlight windows when hovering corresponding task tooltips.

entry.name: launchers
entry.label: Legacy launcher URLs. Migrated into 'slots' on first load.

entry.name: slots
entry.label: Manual slot entries as JSON strings. Each entry: {u: launcherUrl, i: iconName, a: appId, n: appName}. Duplicates allowed; order = on-panel order.

entry.name: middleClickAction
entry.label: What to do on middle-mouse click on a task button.

entry.name: indicateAudioStreams
entry.label: Whether to indicate applications that are playing audio including an option to mute them.

entry.name: fill
entry.label: Whether task manager should occupy all available space.

entry.name: taskHoverEffect
entry.label: Whether task buttons should change in appearance when the mouse pointer is above them.

entry.name: maxTextLines
entry.label: The maximum number of text lines to show in a task button. 0 means no limit.

entry.name: minimizeActiveTaskOnClick
entry.label: Whether to minimize the currently-active task when clicked. If false, clicking on the currently-active task will do nothing.

entry.name: reverseMode
entry.label: Whether to grow the tasks in according to system configuration or opposite to system configuration.

entry.name: iconSpacing
entry.label: Legacy: multiplier for task delegate margins (0/1/3). Kept for backwards compat; new UI uses iconGap + iconPadding.

entry.name: iconGap
entry.label: Gap in px between adjacent task delegates (real Flow spacing, not delegate padding).

entry.name: cornerRadius
entry.label: Legacy shared overlay corner radius. Kept for backwards compat; new UI uses per-state entries below.

entry.name: activeCornerRadius
entry.label: Corner radius for the ACTIVE window overlay. 0 = flat.

entry.name: inactiveCornerRadius
entry.label: Corner radius for INACTIVE-window overlays. 0 = flat.

entry.name: emptySlotCornerRadius
entry.label: Corner radius for EMPTY-slot overlay. 0 = flat.

entry.name: iconPadding
entry.label: Extra padding in px added around task icons on top of the theme margins.

entry.name: iconSize
entry.label: Explicit icon size in px. 0 = auto (fit the available delegate area).

entry.name: activeTintColor
entry.label: Hex color "#rrggbb" for the active-window background tint. Empty = theme highlight color.

entry.name: activeTintOpacity
entry.label: Opacity percent of the active-window tint (0-60).

entry.name: runningTintColor
entry.label: Hex color "#rrggbb" for background tint on running but not-active windows. Empty = theme highlight.

entry.name: runningTintOpacity
entry.label: Opacity percent for the inactive-window background tint. 0 = disabled.

entry.name: emptySlotTintColor
entry.label: Hex color "#rrggbb" for the empty-slot background tint. Empty = theme highlight.

entry.name: emptySlotTintOpacity
entry.label: Opacity percent for the empty-slot background tint. 0 = disabled.

entry.name: attentionBarColor
entry.label: Hex color "#rrggbb" for the edge bar when a window demands attention. Empty = theme negativeText.

entry.name: inactiveIconOpacity
entry.label: Opacity percent for icons that are not the active window (empty slots, bound slots with inactive windows, strays, minimised). 100 = no dimming.

entry.name: showActiveBar
entry.label: Render a thin bar along the outer delegate edge for active / hover / attention states.

entry.name: activeBarThickness
entry.label: Thickness in px of the active-window bar when enabled.

entry.name: bgStyle
entry.label: Background style for the ACTIVE window: 0 = None, 1 = Solid, 2 = Glass, 3 = Gradient.

entry.name: bgStyleInactive
entry.label: Background style for INACTIVE windows (running, not focused): 0 = None, 1 = Solid, 2 = Glass, 3 = Gradient.

entry.name: bgStyleEmptySlot
entry.label: Background style for EMPTY slots: 0 = None, 1 = Solid, 2 = Glass, 3 = Gradient.

entry.name: iconShadowEnabled
entry.label: Render a drop shadow under task icons.

entry.name: iconShadowBlur
entry.label: Shadow blur radius in px.

entry.name: iconShadowOpacity
entry.label: Shadow opacity percent (0-100).

entry.name: iconShadowOffsetX
entry.label: Shadow horizontal offset in px (negative = left).

entry.name: iconShadowOffsetY
entry.label: Shadow vertical offset in px (positive = down). 0 = exactly centred under icon.

entry.name: iconShadowColor
entry.label: Hex color "#rrggbb" for the icon drop shadow. Empty = black.

entry.name: taskBorderActiveEnabled
entry.label: Draw border around the ACTIVE window cell.

entry.name: taskBorderInactiveEnabled
entry.label: Draw border around INACTIVE window cells.

entry.name: taskBorderEmptySlotEnabled
entry.label: Draw border around EMPTY slots.

entry.name: taskBorderThickness
entry.label: Legacy shared border thickness. Kept for backwards compat; new UI uses per-state entries below.

entry.name: activeBorderThickness
entry.label: Border thickness for the ACTIVE window.

entry.name: inactiveBorderThickness
entry.label: Border thickness for INACTIVE windows.

entry.name: emptySlotBorderThickness
entry.label: Border thickness for EMPTY slots.

entry.name: activeBorderOpacity
entry.label: Opacity percent for the ACTIVE-window border.

entry.name: inactiveBorderOpacity
entry.label: Opacity percent for INACTIVE-window borders.

entry.name: emptySlotBorderOpacity
entry.label: Opacity percent for EMPTY-slot borders.

entry.name: taskBorderActiveColor
entry.label: Border color for the active window. Empty = theme highlight.

entry.name: taskBorderInactiveColor
entry.label: Border color for inactive windows. Empty = theme textColor (subtle).

entry.name: taskBorderEmptySlotColor
entry.label: Border color for empty slots. Empty = theme textColor (subtle).

entry.name: inactiveIconSaturation
entry.label: Saturation percent of inactive icons. 100 = full colour.

entry.name: animationSpeed
entry.label: Transition animation duration in ms. 0 = instant.

entry.name: hoverTintEnabled
entry.label: Apply the background tint on hover, not just on active.

entry.name: hoverTintOpacity
entry.label: Hover tint intensity as a percentage of the active tint opacity. 100 = match, 55 = softer (default).

entry.name: hoverTintColor
entry.label: Hex color "#rrggbb" used for the hover tint. Empty = reuse the active-window tint colour.
